headline: State Street Q2: Macro Conditions Continue To Drive Healthy Operating Leverage

headline: State Street reports 56% growth in second quarter profit
summary: Investment management assets under management reached a record $6.3tn, rising 23%.

headline: These Analysts Raise Their Forecasts On State Street Following Upbeat Q2 Results
summary: State Street Corp (STT) reported strong Q2 results, with earnings of $3.65 per share and revenue of $4.05 billion. Share price rose 0.9% in pre-market trading. Analysts raised price targets.
